calendar.matters:
Petition Declaring That Settlors Interest In Real Property Is Owned By Trust For 472 Dewey Blvd., San Francisco; 4758-64 Mission Street, San Francisco
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Advanced From Sep-19-12 To Aug-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Declaring That Settlors Interest In Real Property Is Owned By Trust For 472 Dewey Blvd., San Francisco; 4758-64 Mission Street, San Francisco
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Quinn for and with David Sahagun.

Mr. Quinn stated that the petition was an uncontested matter. The Court granted the Petition Declaring That Settlors Interest In Real Property Is Owned By Trust (subject to review of the order and the order being revised if needed).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
